TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Denis Sassou Nguesso = Mntucing hngkawas 1943 idas 11 jiyax 23 ka Denis Sassou Nguesso ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Congo, the republic of the ta sayang o kiya ka Denis Sassou Nguesso, pnaah hngkawas 1997 idas 10 jiyax 25 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Denis Sassou Nguesso = Joseph Kabila Kabange (/k√¶'biňźl…ô/ kab-EE-l…ô, kari France: ( í…Ēz…õf kabila), mntuting kngkawas 1971 idas 6 diyax 4), Congo Mincu Konghkwo Congsn Sanggiying saya, mnuda Congo Mincu Konghkwo Soto, Tucayce, laqi brah Soto Laurent-D√©sir√© Kabila, wada phqilan ka tama niya daw lmutuc Soto ka Joseph Kabila Kabange. Kndusan mi kyoiku cuxal Joseph Kabila Kabange mi tnrurul swayi qridin niya Jaynet Kabila u mntuting 1971 idas 6 diyax 4. Joseph Kabila Kabange mniq Uganda mi Tanzania wada mnhdu muyas pyasan tutiping mi pyasan tukcka kyoiku, kngkawas 1991 daw mtmay Tanzania Pyasan Tubeyhing Sanrankang muyas horicu, bukuy daw prading musa pcaping heytay, smnul tama niya musa mccbu. Qpahun Kngkawas 2001 idas 1 cida, tama niya Laurent-D√©sir√© Kabila Soto wada phqilun daw, Joseph Kabila Kabange u wada phyuwan Neyke Kaygi subway dha kana biyax dmudul seyhu mi heytay, ngalan Soto mi ucwang butay Congsring. Kngkawas 2006 idas 11 cida, wada mbiyax mangal Soto seyngkyo. Kngkawas 2011 Congo knbaraw hoying diyax 16 ka muda pkla ndanan seyngkyo, mniq kngkawas 2011 idas 11 diyax 28 ka mnuda Soto seyngkyo cida, Joseph Kabila Kabange u wada mangal 48.95% hyo, kiya ka knkana kcka hosweynjn knhbaraw bay hyo niya, mndungus mangal lmutuc qpahun Soto. Kngkawas 2016 idas 12 diyax 31 cida, wada niqan pnsdhuwan kari dha ka Joseph Kabila Kabange tuhuy Hantaypay, Soto seyngkyo u wada dha nsung pniqun kngkawas 2017 thiti balay muda seyngkyo, wada mnhdu prngaw diyax daw seyngkyo kwanweyn u mntxan muda rmngaw hdlun dhuq kngkawas 2019 ka Soto seyngkyo, kiya ka pnklan kari pa wada msang balay kana ka ssediq, bukuy daw pspuruq ka swey yosing, wada danan mirik Congo Mincu Konghkwo Seyhu, niqan 8 hiyi sediq ka wada mrdang, 10 sngari sediq kangyi ka wada qrapun, Congo Mincu Konghkwo Seyhu u pwaya kari alaw 'Quri Anjeyng Qnlhangan', knkana qnlhangan pa kndadax cida prading muda uka spngan diyax mphing wangru mi uuda syunsi. Kngkawas 2018 idas 8 cida, Congo Mincu Konghkwo Seyhu Pkla Kari Niya ka muda pkla kari Joseph Kabila Kabange pa uxay mptumal kngkawas 2012 idas 12 Soto Knbeyhing Seyngkyo. Kndusan niya Joseph Kabila Kabange u mniq kngkawas 2006 idas 6 diyax 1 msupu Olive Lembe di Sita msturung. Pnstrngan dha u mniq kngkawas 2006 idas 6 diyax 17 muda. Niqan 1 laqi qridin, mtuting kngkawas 2001, pthnganun Sifa, bqanan hangan bubu Joseph Kabila Kabange. Alaw Joseph Kabila Kabange pa sinjya Kiristokyo burah kyokay, qridin niya Lembe di Sita ka sinjya Teyngskyo, so kiya pa muda waya psdhu msturung u dmuwi pnspuwan ddha snlhayan niyi muda.
S.PHON: = d…ônis sassou Ňču…ôsso = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas ** …üijax ** ka d…ônis sassou Ňču…ôsso ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan ¶oŇčo, tńß…ô …ĺ…ôpubli ¶ o* tńß…ô ta sajaŇč o kija ka d…ônis sassou Ňču…ôsso, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas ** …üijax ** pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. = d…ônis sassou Ňču…ôsso = …üos…ôpńß kabila kabaŇč…ô (/k*'bi*l…ô/ kab-…ô…ô-l…ô, ka…ĺi *…ĺan ¶…ô: (***** kabila), mntutiŇč kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax *), ¶oŇčo min ¶u koŇčńßkwo ¶oŇčsn saŇčgijiŇč saja, mnuda ¶oŇčo min ¶u koŇčńßkwo soto, tu ¶aj ¶…ô, laqi b…ĺańß soto lau…ĺ…ônt-d*si…ĺ* kabila, wada pńßqilan ka tama nija daw lmutu ¶ soto ka …üos…ôpńß kabila kabaŇč…ô. kndusan mi kjoiku ¶uxal …üos…ôpńß kabila kabaŇč…ô mi tn…ĺu…ĺul swaji q…ĺidin nija …üajn…ôt kabila u mntutiŇč **** idas * dijax *. …üos…ôpńß kabila kabaŇč…ô mniq uganda mi tan*ania wada mnńßdu mujas pjasan tutipiŇč mi pjasan tuk ¶ka kjoiku, kŇčkawas **** daw mtmaj tan*ania pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč san…ĺankaŇč mujas ńßo…ĺi ¶u, bukuj daw p…ĺadiŇč musa p ¶apiŇč ńß…ôtaj, smnul tama nija musa m ¶ ¶bu. qpańßun kŇčkawas **** idas * ¶ida, tama nija lau…ĺ…ônt-d*si…ĺ* kabila soto wada pńßqilun daw, …üos…ôpńß kabila kabaŇč…ô u wada pńßjuwan n…ôk…ô kajgi subwaj dńßa kana bijax dmudul s…ôńßu mi ńß…ôtaj, Ňčalan soto mi u ¶waŇč butaj ¶oŇčs…ĺiŇč. kŇčkawas **** idas ** ¶ida, wada mbijax maŇčal soto s…ôŇčkjo. kŇčkawas **** ¶oŇčo knba…ĺaw ńßojiŇč dijax ** ka muda pkla ndanan s…ôŇčkjo, mniq kŇčkawas **** idas ** dijax ** ka mnuda soto s…ôŇčkjo ¶ida, …üos…ôpńß kabila kabaŇč…ô u wada maŇčal **.**% ńßjo, kija ka knkana k ¶ka ńßosw…ôn…ün knńßba…ĺaw baj ńßjo nija, mnduŇčus maŇčal lmutu ¶ qpańßun soto. kŇčkawas **** idas ** dijax ** ¶ida, wada niqan pnsdńßuwan ka…ĺi dńßa ka …üos…ôpńß kabila kabaŇč…ô tuńßuj ńßantajpaj, soto s…ôŇčkjo u wada dńßa nsuŇč pniqun kŇčkawas **** tńßiti balaj muda s…ôŇčkjo, wada mnńßdu p…ĺŇčaw dijax daw s…ôŇčkjo kwanw…ôn u mntxan muda …ĺmŇčaw ńßdlun dńßuq kŇčkawas **** ka soto s…ôŇčkjo, kija ka pnklan ka…ĺi pa wada msaŇč balaj kana ka ss…ôdiq, bukuj daw pspu…ĺuq ka sw…ô josiŇč, wada danan mi…ĺik ¶oŇčo min ¶u koŇčńßkwo s…ôńßu, niqan * ńßiji s…ôdiq ka wada m…ĺdaŇč, ** sŇča…ĺi s…ôdiq kaŇčji ka wada q…ĺapun, ¶oŇčo min ¶u koŇčńßkwo s…ôńßu u pwaja ka…ĺi alaw 'qu…ĺi an…ü…ôŇč qnlńßaŇčan', knkana qnlńßaŇčan pa kndadax ¶ida p…ĺadiŇč muda uka spŇčan dijax mpńßiŇč waŇč…ĺu mi uuda sjunsi. kŇčkawas **** idas * ¶ida, ¶oŇčo min ¶u koŇčńßkwo s…ôńßu pkla ka…ĺi nija ka muda pkla ka…ĺi …üos…ôpńß kabila kabaŇč…ô pa uxaj mptumal kŇčkawas **** idas ** soto knb…ôńßiŇč s…ôŇčkjo. kndusan nija …üos…ôpńß kabila kabaŇč…ô u mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax * msupu oli*…ô l…ômb…ô di sita mstu…ĺuŇč. pnst…ĺŇčan dńßa u mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** muda. niqan * laqi q…ĺidin, mtutiŇč kŇčkawas ****, ptńßŇčanun si*a, bqanan ńßaŇčan bubu …üos…ôpńß kabila kabaŇč…ô. alaw …üos…ôpńß kabila kabaŇč…ô pa sin…üja ki…ĺistokjo bu…ĺańß kjokaj, q…ĺidin nija l…ômb…ô di sita ka sin…üja t…ôŇčskjo, so kija pa muda waja psdńßu mstu…ĺuŇč u dmuwi pnspuwan ddńßa snlńßajan niji muda.
S.FORM: = Denis Sassou Nguesso = Mntucing hngkawas 1943 idas 11 jiyax 23 ka Denis Sassou Nguesso ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Congo, the republic of the ta sayang o kiya ka Denis Sassou Nguesso, pnaah hngkawas 1997 idas 10 jiyax 25 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Denis Sassou Nguesso = Joseph Kabila Kabange (/k√¶'biňźl…ô/ kab-EE-l…ô, kari France: ( í…Ēz…õf kabila), mntuting kngkawas 1971 idas 6 diyax 4), Congo Mincu Konghkwo Congsn Sanggiying saya, mnuda Congo Mincu Konghkwo Soto, Tucayce, laqi brah Soto Laurent-D√©sir√© Kabila, wada phqilan ka tama niya daw lmutuc Soto ka Joseph Kabila Kabange. Kndusan mi kyoiku cuxal Joseph Kabila Kabange mi tnrurul swayi qridin niya Jaynet Kabila u mntuting 1971 idas 6 diyax 4. Joseph Kabila Kabange mniq Uganda mi Tanzania wada mnhdu muyas pyasan tutiping mi pyasan tukcka kyoiku, kngkawas 1991 daw mtmay Tanzania Pyasan Tubeyhing Sanrankang muyas horicu, bukuy daw prading musa pcaping heytay, smnul tama niya musa mccbu. Qpahun Kngkawas 2001 idas 1 cida, tama niya Laurent-D√©sir√© Kabila Soto wada phqilun daw, Joseph Kabila Kabange u wada phyuwan Neyke Kaygi subway dha kana biyax dmudul seyhu mi heytay, ngalan Soto mi ucwang butay Congsring. Kngkawas 2006 idas 11 cida, wada mbiyax mangal Soto seyngkyo. Kngkawas 2011 Congo knbaraw hoying diyax 16 ka muda pkla ndanan seyngkyo, mniq kngkawas 2011 idas 11 diyax 28 ka mnuda Soto seyngkyo cida, Joseph Kabila Kabange u wada mangal 48.95% hyo, kiya ka knkana kcka hosweynjn knhbaraw bay hyo niya, mndungus mangal lmutuc qpahun Soto. Kngkawas 2016 idas 12 diyax 31 cida, wada niqan pnsdhuwan kari dha ka Joseph Kabila Kabange tuhuy Hantaypay, Soto seyngkyo u wada dha nsung pniqun kngkawas 2017 thiti balay muda seyngkyo, wada mnhdu prngaw diyax daw seyngkyo kwanweyn u mntxan muda rmngaw hdlun dhuq kngkawas 2019 ka Soto seyngkyo, kiya ka pnklan kari pa wada msang balay kana ka ssediq, bukuy daw pspuruq ka swey yosing, wada danan mirik Congo Mincu Konghkwo Seyhu, niqan 8 hiyi sediq ka wada mrdang, 10 sngari sediq kangyi ka wada qrapun, Congo Mincu Konghkwo Seyhu u pwaya kari alaw 'Quri Anjeyng Qnlhangan', knkana qnlhangan pa kndadax cida prading muda uka spngan diyax mphing wangru mi uuda syunsi. Kngkawas 2018 idas 8 cida, Congo Mincu Konghkwo Seyhu Pkla Kari Niya ka muda pkla kari Joseph Kabila Kabange pa uxay mptumal kngkawas 2012 idas 12 Soto Knbeyhing Seyngkyo. Kndusan niya Joseph Kabila Kabange u mniq kngkawas 2006 idas 6 diyax 1 msupu Olive Lembe di Sita msturung. Pnstrngan dha u mniq kngkawas 2006 idas 6 diyax 17 muda. Niqan 1 laqi qridin, mtuting kngkawas 2001, pthnganun Sifa, bqanan hangan bubu Joseph Kabila Kabange. Alaw Joseph Kabila Kabange pa sinjya Kiristokyo burah kyokay, qridin niya Lembe di Sita ka sinjya Teyngskyo, so kiya pa muda waya psdhu msturung u dmuwi pnspuwan ddha snlhayan niyi muda.

pniqun kŇčkawas **** tńßiti balaj muda s…ôŇčkjo, wada mnńßdu p…ĺŇčaw dijax daw s…ôŇčkjo kwanw…ôn u mntxan muda …ĺmŇčaw ńßdlun dńßuq kŇčkawas **** ka soto s…ôŇčkjo, kija ka pnklan ka…ĺi pa wada msaŇč balaj kana ka ss…ôdiq, bukuj daw pspu…ĺuq ka sw…ô josiŇč, wada danan mi…ĺik ¶oŇčo min ¶u koŇčńßkwo s…ôńßu, niqan * ńßiji s…ôdiq ka wada m…ĺdaŇč, ** sŇča…ĺi s…ôdiq kaŇčji ka wada q…ĺapun, ¶oŇčo min ¶u ¶u koŇčńßkwo s…ôńßu pkla ka…ĺi nija ka muda pkla ka…ĺi …üos…ôpńß kabila kabaŇč…ô pa uxaj mptumal kŇčkawas **** idas ** soto knb…ôńßiŇč s…ôŇčkjo. kndusan nija …üos…ôpńß kabila kabaŇč…ô u mniq kŇčkawas
